headline: Stable positive sentiment (score: +4.2)
key_insights: Optimism trending up 288% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 124 quotes including 91 at strong intensity - people are expressing major grievances today.

• The frustration score of 35.0 sits in the lower-middle range but the high volume of strong-intensity comments shows deep anger beneath the surface.

• Optimism bounced back significantly from yesterday's low of -13.0 to reach its highest point in the 103-day period at 17.4.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
